testcase.name: test_convert_nonexistent_lead
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_conversion.py:490: in test_convert_nonexistent_lead assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
